1.description: (Color online) The ODA Solution μ ODA for M / M / c / k Systems Notes . (a) With respect to different k ’s. (b) With respect to different c ’s. The system has a gross margin of p − b = 1 , a waiting cost of w = 0.3, a true arrival rate of Λ T = 1 , c = 4 servers, and k = 10 spaces. The optimal base operational statistic μ ODA is computed from Equation (11) , and μ ETO is computed from Equation (7) .

2.description: (Color online) The Performance of the ODA Reward for M / M / c / k Systems Notes . (a) With respect to different k ’s. (b) With respect to different c ’s. The base setting is the same as in Figure 1 . The optimality gap is computed as ( ϕ * − E [ ψ ( Λ T , μ ODA ( X ) ) ] ) ϕ * × 100 % based on Theorem 1 .
